creator: hsw@bitmark.com
text:
Slack appears to have removed the APIs this port depends on and as a result it no longer connects, just displays update browser message.  Also a check on github shows:
        This repository has been archived by the owner. It is now read-only.

It seems this is a fork of net-im/teamwords and that port also has the same problem.  I think this could also be removed.
